title: Spain announces tax cuts on fuel, electricity in response to energy crisis
summary_full: The measures will “mobilise” €5 billion through tax breaks and subsidies, Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said
summary_public: The measures will “mobilise” €5 billion through tax breaks and subsidies, Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said
